Hello everybody, I am Dr. Casci and welcome to the curriculum overview of the hybrid implementation section. I am super excited to show this to you guys. We spent a lot of time and effort on it and I just want to give you a little bit of a logic of what's going on from like a bird's-eye view. Alright, so as it stands this is essentially a six month program that is dedicated towards a couple of things. Number one is that when most very low level general population comes in their coachability is essentially zero and so if you give a person without coachability specific instructions you end up having to do a ton of labor to try and fill in those gaps as you go and hope that as time goes on the person becomes more adherent and so this is structured as such that you actually ramp up the difficulty of the program by virtue of their competency level but also stack the cards in both of your favor by engineering it so that they still make fitness and weight loss progress along the way. So that is the first logical step of this and the second side of that same coin is that you actually start out in terms of direction is actually person is fairly limited in what they are going to be doing and as time goes on you allocate more freedom to the decisions that they make but also give them the tools to be more accurate and so in the very beginning the accuracy they need is very low but they're limited in the behaviors they need to perform and as time goes on you demand more of the client but at the same time they make more progress along the way because they're able to be more specific with the behaviors and measurements they take and so I will be getting into each of these sections separately and just want to break down really fast that there is a dedicated supplement nutrition and fitness aspect of each of the three phases where the first phase is hardcore dedicated weight loss and then the second section is when you slowly start to incorporate activity and then at the end of that section you actually incorporate a specific type of activity geared towards their goal and then after a book of their weight losses occurred then you work them back up to a reasonable amount of calories and then you assess after that period and then at that point you start to employ more specific tactics so I will see you guys in the next video
